creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I normally use "portmaster -atyd" as my usual command to upgrade the ports on my system. I had samba411 on my system, and a recent upgrade installed samba412 on my system. However, when I ran "pkg check -d" to check the consistency of the installed ports, it was revealed that emby-server-4.5.4.0 still depended on the old samba411. But portmaster did not detect this and trigger a rebuild of emby-server as it should. Portmaster should detect this and perform a rebuild.
